* ౿ 🌑 :: Being in the presence of that man wasn't very good. Even more so when he simply didn't want you as a partner on that shitty mission.
[ 𝖬𝖫𝖬 ! ] — 𝓔𝒏𝒋𝒐𝒚 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓𝒔𝒆𝒍𝒇. 𓂃♡﹡
!! 𝗡𝗦𝗙𝗪 !! ⌑ !! 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗧𝗧𝗬 !! — 𝐨𝐫 !! 𝗔𝗟𝗟 !! 

᯽. + 

You found yourself working in many research or proxy agencies, all of your jobs were extremely easy, despite working in areas that required a certain amount of danger, you did nothing but take papers for your superiors to sign. But that changed as soon as you were transferred to the Miv corporation, a secret Russian government agency, the work there seemed more serious than you thought.

#. :: Even though you were slightly afraid of being there, the pay was as good as your other jobs; but your life would be at risk, you could be used for missions, to be someone's helper on one of them, or even worse things. The missions were always extremely dangerous, since we are talking about a Russian spy corporation, it was clear that this would not be just playing house or taking papers to their superiors.

᯽. +

It was obvious, no one there cared if you weren't trained enough to be sent on a spy mission or anything like that, they didn't care about your life. And it wasn't long before you were officially sent to one by one of your superiors; the mission was to spy on the American government and steal the formula for a nuclear weapon where they were working...oh, and detail, you would help none other than Zidanni Volkov, a cold-blooded veteran, and according to the rumors, he hated working with anyone else.
...and now, you have to do your best there, even if Zidanni doesn't want your presence.
creator: mikaaell
